title: cornus excelsa
intro: Cornus excelsa, also known as the Australian Black Bean, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Cornaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cornus excelsa include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Cornus excelsa include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions and digestive problems.
